spec.description: Dashboard for MariaDB 11.8 monitoring via prometheus mysqld_exporter.

spec.title: InnoDB File Per Table
spec.description: If Enabled, By Default every Table will have its own Tablespace represented as its own .idb file  rather than all tables stored in single system tablespace

spec.title: Rollback on Timeout
spec.description: Whenever to rollback all transaction on timeout or just last statement

spec.title: Row Lock Blocking
spec.description: Percent of Active Sections which are blocked due to waiting on InnoDB Row Locks

spec.title: InnoDB Row Lock Wait Load
spec.description: Average Number of Sessions blocked from proceeding due to waiting on row level lock

spec.title: InnoDB Sort Buffer Size
spec.description: This Buffer is used for Buidling InnoDB Indexes using Sort algorithm

spec.title: Update Stats when Metadata Queried
spec.description: Refresh InnoDB Statistics when meta-data queries by SHOW TABLE STATUS or INFORMATION_SCHEMA queries.  If Enabled can cause severe performance issues

spec.title: InnoDB Persistent Sample Pages
spec.description: Number of Pages To Sample if Persistent Statistics are Enabled

spec.title: InnoDB Transient Sample Pages
spec.description: Number of Pages To Sample if Persistent Statistics are Disabled

spec.title: Log Buffer Waits/s
spec.description: Rate of Innodb_log_waits — how often a session had to wait for the InnoDB log buffer to be flushed because it was full. Should normally be ~0. Sustained > 0 means innodb_log_buffer_size is too small for your workload. Replaces the original "Log Written Per Fsync" — Innodb_os_log_fsyncs was removed in MariaDB 10.8 when the redo log was redesigned.

spec.title: Data Written Per Row Written
spec.description: Note: Due to difference in timing of Row Write and Data Write the value may be misleading on short intervals

spec.title: InnoDB Log IO
spec.description:
**InnoDB I/O**

_Data Writes_ - The total number of InnoDB data writes._Data Reads_ - The total number of InnoDB data reads (OS file reads)._Log Writes_ - The number of physical writes to the InnoDB redo log file._Data Fsyncs_ - The number of fsync() operations. The frequency of fsync() calls is influenced by the setting of the `innodb_flush_method` configuration option.

spec.title: MariaDB Uptime - $instance
spec.description: **MySQL Uptime**

spec.title: Aria Pagecache Block Usage
spec.description: Aria storage engine page-cache state. Aria is MariaDB's transactional MyISAM successor and backs system tables.

spec.title: Aria Pagecache Hit Ratio
spec.description: Ratio of Aria pagecache requests served from memory (higher is better).

spec.title: Thread Pool Threads
spec.description: MariaDB's built-in thread pool (thread_handling=pool-of-threads). Empty if you run one-thread-per-connection.

spec.expr: avg by (instance) (mysql_global_status_threadpool_threads{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}) - avg by (instance) (mysql_global_status_threadpool_idle_threads{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.title: Thread Pool Size
spec.description: Configured thread_pool_size (target number of thread groups).

spec.title: Thread Pool Utilization
spec.description: Fraction of pool threads currently busy.

spec.expr: (avg by (instance) (mysql_global_status_threadpool_threads{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}) - avg by (instance) (mysql_global_status_threadpool_idle_threads{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"})) / clamp_min(avg by (instance) (mysql_global_status_threadpool_threads{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}), 1) * 100

spec.title: Query Cache Activity
spec.description: MariaDB still ships the query cache (disabled by default since 10.1.7). Empty if query_cache_type=OFF.

spec.title: Query Cache Hit Ratio
spec.description: Hits / (hits + inserts + not-cached).

spec.title: wsrep Local State
spec.description: Galera node state: 1=Joining, 2=Donor/Desynced, 3=Joined, 4=Synced. 0 means Galera is not enabled.

spec.title: Galera Cluster Size
spec.description: Number of nodes currently in the Galera cluster (0 = Galera disabled).

spec.title: Galera Replication Throughput
spec.description: Galera writeset replication rate (empty if Galera is not configured).

spec.title: Galera Flow Control & Queues
spec.description: High flow_control_paused or growing queues indicate a slow node throttling the cluster.

spec.title: Top 10 SQL by Elapsed Time
spec.description: Top 10 statements by total elapsed DB time (sum of execution time per second of wall clock — i.e., average concurrency this digest holds). Closest MariaDB equivalent of AWR "Top SQL by Elapsed Time". Requires mysqld_exporter --collect.perf_schema.eventsstatements.

spec.title: Top 10 Wait Events
spec.description: Top 10 perf_schema wait events by total wait time per second. Equivalent of AWR "Top 5 Timed Events". Requires mysqld_exporter --collect.perf_schema.eventswaits. Idle waits (idle/io/...) often dominate — adjust performance_schema_setup to disable them if they obscure the real picture.

spec.title: Top 10 SQL by Executions/s
spec.description: Top 10 statements by execution rate (calls per second). Complements Top SQL by Elapsed Time — frequent-but-cheap queries appear here while heavy-but-rare queries dominate the elapsed-time chart.

spec.title: Current QPS - $instance
spec.description:
**Current QPS**

Based on the queries reported by MySQL's ``SHOW STATUS`` command, it is the number of statements executed by the server within the last second. This variable includes statements executed within stored programs, unlike the Questions variable. It does not count 
``COM_PING`` or ``COM_STATISTICS`` commands.

spec.title: MariaDB Network Traffic - $instance
spec.description:
**MySQL Network Traffic**

Here we can see how much network traffic is generated by MySQL. Outbound is network traffic sent from MySQL and Inbound is network traffic MySQL has received.

spec.title: MariaDB Client Thread Activity - $instance
spec.description:
**MySQL Active Threads**

Threads Connected is the number of open connections, while Threads Running is the number of threads not sleeping.

spec.title: BP Size of Total RAM
spec.description: Buffer pool size as percent of host RAM. Requires node_exporter to be scraped by the same Prometheus; uses scalar() so it does not depend on matching labels.

spec.title: BP Write Activity
spec.description: Combined value of Buffer Pool Read and Write requests

spec.title: Buffer Pool Miss Ratio
spec.description: How often buffer pool read requests have to do read from the disk. Keep this percent low for good performance

spec.title: Portion of Buffer Pool To Dump/Load
spec.description: innodb_buffer_pool_dump_pct — percent of most-recently-used buffer pool pages dumped at shutdown (used to warm the BP at startup). Your exporter does not expose this variable; shown value is MariaDB default (25). Verify actual value with: SHOW GLOBAL VARIABLES LIKE "innodb_buffer_pool_dump_pct";

spec.expr: avg by (instance,state) (max_over_time(mysql_global_status_buffer_pool_pages{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", state=~"free|data|misc"}[$__interval]) or max_over_time(mysql_global_status_buffer_pool_pages{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", state=~"free|data|misc"}[5m]))

spec.legendFormat: Pages Fetched by Linear Read Ahead
Paged Fetched by Random Read Ahead
Paged Fetched by Read Ahead but Never Accessed

matcher.options: Paged Fetched by Random Read Ahead
Paged Fetched by Read Ahead but Never Accessed
Paged Fetched by Random Read Ahead
Paged Fetched by Read Ahead but Never Accessed

spec.title: Lock Wait Timeout
spec.description:
** InnoDB Lock Wait Timeout **
How long to wait for row lock before timing out

spec.title: InnoDB Deadlock Detection
spec.description: If Disabled InnoDB Will not detect deadlocks but rely on timeouts

spec.title: InnoDB Auto Increment Lock Mode
spec.description: Will Define How mush locking will come from working with Auto Increment Columns

spec.title: InnoDB Row Reads
spec.description: Row reads at the SQL handler layer (sums all read_* handlers). Used as a fallback because this exporter does not expose mysql_global_status_innodb_rows_read or mysql_global_status_innodb_row_ops_total.

spec.expr: sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_rows_read{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_row_ops_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", operation="read"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_handlers_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", handler=~"read_.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.title: InnoDB Row Writes
spec.description: Row writes at the SQL handler layer. Fallback because this exporter does not expose Innodb_rows_* counters.

spec.expr: sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_rows_inserted{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_row_ops_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", operation="inserted"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_handlers_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", handler="write"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_rows_updated{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_row_ops_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", operation="updated"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_handlers_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", handler="update"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_rows_deleted{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_innodb_row_ops_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", operation="deleted"}[$__rate_interval])) or sum(rate(mysql_global_status_handlers_total{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", handler="delete"}[$__rate_interval]))

matcher.options: Paged Fetched by Random Read Ahead
Paged Fetched by Read Ahead but Never Accessed

spec.title: InnoDB Tables
spec.description: Current Number of InnoDB Tables in database

spec.title: Data Buffer Pool Fit
spec.description: Buffer Pool Size as Portion of the Data

spec.title: Data Size Per Row
spec.description: Amount of Data Per Row

spec.expr: sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum(mysql_info_schema_table_size{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",component="data_length"}) by (schema,table)) / (sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum (mysql_info_schema_table_rows{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}) by (schema,table)))

spec.title: Index Size Per Row
spec.description: Index Size Per Row shows how much space we're using for indexes on per row basics

spec.expr: sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum(mysql_info_schema_table_size{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",component="index_length"}) by (schema,table)) / (sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum (mysql_info_schema_table_rows{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance"}) by (schema,table)))

spec.title: Space Allocated
spec.description: Total Amount of Space Allocated.    May not exactly match amount of space used on file system but provided great guidance

spec.title: Space Used
spec.description: Space used in All  InnoDB Tables.   Reported Allocated Space Less Free Space

spec.title: Data Length
spec.description: Space Used by Data (Including Primary Key)

spec.title: Index Length
spec.description: Space Used by Secondary Indexes

spec.title: Estimated Rows
spec.description: Estimated number of Rows in InnoDB Storage Engine. It is not exact value and it can change abruptly as information is updated

spec.title: Indexing Overhead
spec.description: How Much Indexes Take Compared to Data

spec.expr: (sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum (mysql_info_schema_table_size{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",component="index_length"}) by (schema,table)))/(sum(count(mysql_info_schema_table_version{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance", engine="InnoDB"}) by (schema,table) * sum (mysql_info_schema_table_size{db=~"$db", instance=~"$instance",component="data_length"}) by (schema,table)))

spec.title: Free
spec.description: How Much Space is Free. Too high value wastes space on disk

spec.title: Mariadb Database
